# Doc Holiday Documentation (staging)

> Doc Holiday (doc.holiday) writes and maintains documentation and release notes from
> what actually shipped: it reads connected source repositories, drafts changes as
> reviewable diffs, and opens pull requests a human approves. This documentation site
> is written and maintained by Doc Holiday itself.

Append index.md to any page URL to fetch its raw Markdown source.

## Overview
- What Is Doc Holiday: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/what-is-doc-holiday/ — documentation drift, and the product that closes it continuously.
- How Doc Holiday Works: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/how-doc-holiday-works/ — the user-seat loop: request → plan → draft from source → review → pull request.
- Concepts: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/concepts/ — Publication, Source, the Library, Work History.

## Getting started
- Quickstart: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/quickstart/ — zero to your first merged Doc-Holiday-written doc.
- Connect GitHub: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/connect-github/ — install the GitHub Application and connect repositories.
- Connect GitLab: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/connect-gitlab/ — connect GitLab projects as Sources; Doc Holiday opens merge requests there.
- Connect Bitbucket: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/connect-bitbucket/ — workspace token provider or per-project tokens.
- Create Your First Publication: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/create-your-first-publication/ — Sources, docs destination, output types.
- Add Your OpenAI Key: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/add-your-openai-key/ — add and test your organization's OpenAI key.

## Working with Doc Holiday
- Request Work in Git: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/request-work-in-git/ — mention @doc.holiday in the PR or issue thread you are already using.
- Request Work in the App: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/request-work-in-the-app/ — start and steer documentation work from the app.
- Review and Revise: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/review-and-revise/ — diffs, comments, follow-up passes, approve into a pull request.
- Work History: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/work-history/ — the record of every request and its lifecycle.

## Prompting Guide
- Prompting Guide: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/prompting-guide/ — standing instructions vs per-request prompts, and how they compose.
- Writing Requests: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/writing-requests/ — the craft of asking for exactly the page you want.
- Writing Style Guides: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/writing-style-guides/ — make everything Doc Holiday writes sound like your team.
- Writing Planning Instructions: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/writing-planning-instructions/ — shape what Doc Holiday decides to work on.
- Prompt Patterns: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/prompt-patterns/ — request skeletons for common documentation jobs.
- Fully Automated Setup: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/fully-automated-setup/ — set it up once: triggers, standing instructions, and the full prompts to paste.

## Sources
- Sources: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/sources/ — what Doc Holiday reads and writes; freshness and health.
- Connect Notion: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/connect-notion/ — share Notion pages with an integration so Doc Holiday can read them.
- Connect Confluence and Jira: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/connect-confluence-and-jira/ — Confluence as read-only context; Jira app-backed or read-only.
- Connect Linear: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/connect-linear/ — let Linear issues and comments trigger documentation work.
- Connect Google Drive: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/connect-google-drive/ — supply background material from Google Drive.
- Connect Cloud Storage: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/connect-cloud-storage/ — read-only context from S3 or Azure Blob.
- Manage Connections: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/manage-connections/ — health, access recovery, edits, removal.

## Publications
- Publications: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/publications/ — what a Publication defines and controls.
- Configure Triggers: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/configure-triggers/ — control when Doc Holiday reacts on its own.
- Output Types: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/output-types/ — documentation, release notes, and changelogs.
- Publishing Systems: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/publishing-systems/ — supported docs frameworks and docs-repo expectations.
- Manage Publications: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/manage-publications/ — edit a Publication, control access, delete safely.

## The Library
- The Library: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/the-library/ — instructions, slots, global vs scoped, precedence.
- Instruction Slots Reference: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/instruction-slots-reference/ — the five instruction slots and where each is applied.

## Automation & integrations
- GitHub Action: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/github-action/ — run Doc Holiday from a GitHub Actions workflow.
- GitLab Pipelines: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/gitlab-pipelines/ — invoke Doc Holiday from GitLab CI/CD pipelines.
- Slack Notifications: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/slack-notifications/ — send Doc Holiday notifications to Slack.

## Coding agents & MCP
- Coding Agents: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/coding-agents/ — two ways a coding agent works with Doc Holiday: the plugin, or the API.
- Install the Doc Holiday Plugin: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/install-the-doc-holiday-plugin/ — install the plugin in Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, or Cursor.
- Plan and Generate Docs with Skills: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/plan-and-generate-docs-with-skills/ — the three skills that take a codebase to a generated docs site.
- Request Docs via the API: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/request-docs-via-the-api/ — file a documentation request from any agent with one REST call.

## Administration
- User Management: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/user-management/ — invites, roles, and publication access.
- Audit Log: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/audit-log/ — the event catalog and where to find it.
- AI Provider Keys: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/ai-provider-keys/ — add, test, and rotate keys; active-key behavior.
- Billing and Plans: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/billing-and-plans/ — plans, billing, and what each plan includes.
- Security and Data Handling: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/security-and-data-handling/ — SOC 2 Type II certified, no code retention, and what Doc Holiday never does.

## Reference
- API Overview: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/api-overview/ — auth, base URL, and the shape of the REST API.
- Publications API: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/publications-api/ — manage Publications over the REST API.
- Connections API: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/connections-api/ — manage Sources and providers over the REST API.
- Work History API: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/work-history-api/ — create and follow work requests over the REST API.
- Users API: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/users-api/ — manage users over the REST API.
- Instruction Library API: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/instruction-library-api/ — manage Library instructions over the REST API.
- Audit Log API: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/audit-log-api/ — query audit events over the REST API.
- Connection Types: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/connection-types/ — every connection type, its role, and its triggers.
- Trigger and Event Types: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/trigger-and-event-types/ — every trigger and event type, enumerated.
- Work History States: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/work-history-states/ — every state a work request can be in.
- MCP Tools: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/mcp-tools/ — the doc_holiday_* MCP tools the plugin registers, and their arguments.
- Glossary: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/glossary/ — Doc Holiday's terms, defined once.

## Meta
- Release Notes: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/release-notes/ — user-visible changes, newest first.
- Release Notes Archive: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/release-notes-archive/ — entries prior to June 2026.
- Troubleshooting and FAQ: https://joels-sandgarden.github.io/external-docs-staging/docs/troubleshooting-and-faq/ — symptom-first answers.
